sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64720" key="makro/tomos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μακρό-τομος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n64720.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pruned so that the shoots are left long</tr_>, of vines, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βραχύτομος</foreign>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg002:3:2:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.2.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
